---

In all BMAD resource files, the template variable {bmad-path} resolves to: c:\Users\SummerNeal\.vscode\extensions\msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1\resources\_aac
The template variable {project-root} refers to the workspace/project root directory.

IT IS CRITICAL THAT YOU FOLLOW THIS COMMAND: LOAD the FULL c:\Users\SummerNeal\.vscode\extensions\msayedshokry.agileagentcanvas-0.4.1\resources\_aac/bmm/workflows/4-implementation/create-story/workflow.yaml, READ its entire contents and follow its directions exactly!
